ford_tourneo_custom_job_note_17567bf8d4.text: Late Tourneo Custom shares the Transit Custom Hitag Pro key family and OEM references. Exact operation-level tool IDs still need mapping.

ford_tourneo_custom_job_note_b86d1aba25.text: Passenger derivative of the first-generation Transit Custom. Core key data follows the matching V362/V363 Transit Custom security family.

ford_tourneo_custom_job_note_f6c2074bca.text: Use only where passive start is physically confirmed. Core key family and OEM references follow the matching Transit Custom application.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
